summary: 0.6.54 rolls the button-5 grab-navigation override back to the narrower 0.6.28 input contract while preserving the restored movie scrub session from 0.6.53, and it restores canonical raw dev_deploy filenames without pruning older versioned comparison artifacts.
operatorSignals: Repo logs identify 0.6.28 as almost perfect and name the joystick top or 5 grab-navigation press as the first input seam that still felt wrong.
The current lane wants tiny input-contract rollback only, not another movie scrub model change.
Filename canon was written down already, and the current raw build drifted away from it while deleting older versioned comparison artifacts.
actionsTaken: Compared the current CUA input module against the 0.6.28 seam and isolated the later button-5 override additions.
Removed the joystick button 5 fallback override and restored the earlier override timing and capture policy from 0.6.28.
Kept the restored 0.6.53 movie scrub session and current image stepping behavior intact.
Restored canonical raw dev_deploy filenames for the core player to asset_dev_player, plugin_player_dev, and scene_dev_player with the alpha iteration token.
Stopped pruning older versioned raw asset_dev_player and plugin_player_dev artifacts so comparison witnesses remain on disk.
nonGoals: No slideshow work in this slice.
No right-stick volume, gaze redesign, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
No new movie scrub primitive changes in this slice.
